name: Emberron Cred-iT Consultant
description_short: Emberron Cred-iT Consultant is a credit counseling service located in Fort Worth, TX offering free or low-cost credit guidance to consumers.
description_long:
Emberron Cred-iT Consultant is a credit counseling service based in Fort Worth, Texas, established as a consumer finance resource for individuals seeking credit advice and financial guidance. The company operates as a free-help service, positioning itself within the non-profit or community-based credit counseling space rather than commercial debt resolution or credit repair. Their primary focus is on providing accessible credit counseling to consumers in the Fort Worth area and potentially beyond through their online presence.

The company offers credit counseling services designed to help consumers understand and improve their financial situations. Based on their online presence and stated mission, they provide guidance on credit-related matters, though specific service details are limited in their available marketing materials. Their approach appears to emphasize educational support and counseling rather than aggressive dispute or settlement tactics.

Emberron Cred-iT Consultant distinguishes itself through its free-help model, suggesting they operate on a non-profit basis or offer services without predatory fees common in the credit repair industry. Their presence as a blogspot-based business indicates a grassroots or community-focused operation. They maintain a local Fort Worth address and direct phone contact, suggesting accessibility and local accountability rather than a large corporate structure.

However, significant limitations exist in evaluating this company. The website provides minimal substantive information about their specific services, credentials, certifications, or track record. There is no evidence of NFCC certification or HUD approval visible in their materials. The blog platform hosting and sparse content suggest a potentially newer or under-resourced operation. Consumer reviews or testimonials are absent, and there is no information about their business history, staff qualifications, or success metrics. The company should provide transparency regarding any certifications, non-profit status, and detailed service descriptions before consumers commit to working with them.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free or low-cost credit counseling service (no-fee model aligns with free-help category)
Local Fort Worth, Texas address provides in-person accessibility and community connection
Direct phone contact (817) 904-3771 available for consumer inquiries
Positioned as credit counseling service rather than predatory credit repair operation
Online presence via blog indicates some digital accessibility for consumers
cons: Minimal website content provides no details on specific services, certifications, or credentials
No visible NFCC certification, HUD approval, or other professional accreditation mentioned
Complete absence of customer reviews, testimonials, or documented success cases
Unclear business structure—no evidence of non-profit status or regulatory compliance documentation
Sparse marketing materials and outdated blog (last post January 2022) suggest limited operational scale or resources
best_for: Fort Worth-area residents seeking local, accessible credit counseling with minimal cost
Consumers preferring community-based guidance over large corporate credit services
Individuals new to credit counseling looking for introductory education
diagnosis: Emberron Cred-iT Consultant appears to be a local credit counseling service positioned in the free-help category, best suited for Fort Worth residents seeking non-commercial credit guidance. The primary caveat is the severe lack of verifiable information—consumers should independently confirm their credentials, certifications, and operational status before engaging services, as the available website content provides insufficient evidence of legitimacy, professional standards, or track record.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2828 White Rock Dr, Fort Worth, TX 76131
